text.message: Ppl trade you for free for some reason
There is 0 need for you to accept a Nb

Nobody is gonna rob you and you just feed the leader

why not city on your massive wood pile
you still like that 4 ore block?
which is why you keep extending
when oj was amassing ore and wheat?
